The market's riskiest way to trade on the biggest tech stocks is not well understood by investors
ETFs that allow investors to make big bets on market moves are gaining in popularity

holdings.infoBox: NVDL is an equity ETF with a total of 29 individual holdings. The top holdings are Nvda Equity Swap stock at 109.52%, Nvda Equity Swap 2 at 30.22%, Recv Long 2x Nvda Trs Mx2 at 29.47%, Cash at 12.61%, and Recv Long Nvda Trs Gs2 at 10.81%.

overview.description: The GraniteShares 2x Long NVDA Daily ETF (NVDL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of NVIDIA Corporation stock. NVDL was launched on Dec 13, 2022 and is issued by GraniteShares.
